authority_notes.nelis: Official Nevada Legislature site for bill text PDFs, history wording, hearings/recommendations, floor vote member lists.
authority_notes.openstates: Structured API mirror for actions/votes/sponsorships; useful for machine joins and party fields, but detail enrichment can fail (429/5xx).
authority_notes.crosscheck_rule: Flag conflicts for human review. Prefer NELIS wording for citations; use OpenStates when NELIS detail scrape failed and OpenStates enrichment succeeded.
